items.title: I've added an estimate for Dean Wade's salary to my cap sheets. Leaves the Sixers with ~$8m in space under the tax, and $16.6m in space under the first apron, which is now a hard cap for the Sixers.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt:
I've added an estimate for Dean Wade's salary to my cap sheets. Leaves the Sixers with ~$8m in space under the tax, and $16.6m in space under the first apron, which is now a hard cap for the Sixers.

items.title: Dean Wade will go into the Sixers non-taxpayer mid-level exception. They're now $16.6 million below the first apron hard cap.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade will go into the Sixers non-taxpayer mid-level exception. They're now $16.6 million below the first apron hard cap.

They have about $6 million remaining of their MLE, but using it would push them up against the luxury tax line.

items.title: Dean Wade figures to slot into the Sixers' starting lineup moving forward alongside Tyrese Maxey, VJ Edgecombe, Paul George and Joel Embiid, offering some much-needed positional size in the frontcourt.

items.title: Sources: Dean Wade and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a four-year, $39 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Wade reunites with Mike Gansey after the two spent time together with the Cleveland Cavaliers. Agent Austin Walton finalized the agreement.

items.body_excerpt: Sources: Dean Wade and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a four-year, $39 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Wade reunites with Mike Gansey after the two spent time together with the Cleveland Cavaliers. Agent Austin Walton finalized the agreement.

items.title: Dean Wade's contract will come out of the Non-Taxpayer MLE for the Philadelphia 76ers.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Dean Wade's contract will come out of the Non-Taxpayer MLE for the Philadelphia 76ers.

They'll now be hard-capped at the first apron. Sixers have roughly $13.8M in space under the first apron with two open standard roster spots.

items.title: Sixers will be hard-capped at the first apron as a result of using the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception to sign Dean Wade.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Sixers will be hard-capped at the first apron as a result of using the non-taxpayer’s mid-level exception to sign Dean Wade.
